_about: Curated, public-source threat intel for crypto wallets. Keyless signal so the pipeline gives a REAL verdict for known-bad addresses offline. ETH keys are lowercased; BTC kept as-is (case-sensitive base58/bech32). Extend via keyed feeds (Chainabuse) when a key is present.
